description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:latest Docker image and defines a MAVEN_CLI_OPTS variable set to '-f backend/pom.xml '. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile. In the test stage add a test job that runs mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test. No caches, artifacts, services or special rules are required.
